text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer... Thank you... so much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's the Satsuki Sho! The Satsuki Sho! I've looked forward to entering a Classic race for such a long time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, there were times I felt like giving
up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
High hopes or not, I knew I wouldn't be able to
take on the Classics without a strong enough
heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But then I met you, and little by little, I overcame
my struggles. Now I've made it here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was always hiding behind McQueen, not even
seeing what was in front of me. Now I can finally
stand on my own!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. The Nakayama 2,000-meter track is
the right distance for me to show what I can do.
So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely make an impression! People will
know that Mejiro Ryan was here!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hey hey, aren't you the eager one? Did you
forget that I'm here too?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, well, don't count me out! I'm ready to
dazzle you with my highly polished starting
sprint! ♪
